meta.title: Wadooyinka Sharciga ah ee UK — SafePassage
meta.description: Dhammaan wadooyinka sharciga ah ee Boqortooyada Ingiriiska.

hero.title: Wadooyinka Sharciga ah ee Boqortooyada Ingiriiska
hero.sub: UK waxay bixisaa wadooyin sharci ah oo badan oo loogu talagalay nolol, shaqo, waxbarasho iyo raadinta ximaayadda. Wadooyin kasta oo ku jira boggan waa la ansixiyay, ammaan, hana ku jirin gudbintii khatar lahayd.

cards.name: Magan Gelinta
cards.desc: Haddaad ka carareyso cadaadiska ama dagaalka, waxaad leedahay xaq sharci ah oo magan gelin UK ah. Habka waa bilaash oo waxaa ilaaliya sharciga caalamiga ah.

cards.name: Viisada Shaqaale Xirfadlaha
cards.desc: UK si firfircoon ayey u raadisaa xirfadlayaasha dheeriga ah ee xirfadda caafimaadka, teknoolojiyada, injineernimada. Dalabka shaqada ee shirkad UK oo rukhsada leh ayaa ah shuruudda ugu muhiimsan.

cards.name: Viisada Ardayga
cards.desc: Ma jaamacad UK ah lagu qabtay? Waxaad si sharci ah ugu soo galeen viisad ardayga, ka shaqeyso waqti gaaban, oo 2–3 sano ka dib graduation ku sii joogto.

cards.name: Viisada Qoyska
cards.desc: Haddii xubin qoyska ah oo dhow yahay muwaadin Ingiriis ah ama haysto rukhsad joogto ah UK, waad u qalmi kartaa inaad si sharci ah ugu biirto.

cards.name: Barnaamijyada Dib-u-dejinta
cards.desc: UK waxay maamusho barnaamijyo rasmiyeed oo dib-u-dejin ee qaxootiga ugu nugul — UKRS, ACRS, ARAP. Kuwani waxay dadka u keenaan UK si ammaan ah, duullimaad, bilaash.
